creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 236359
"git diff" patch to update the port

- Update 2.003 -> 2.004
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/ARISTOTLE/Class-Observable-2.004/source/Changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p2
pkg 1.18.3
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
